narrative:
Cols 12-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 2,278 registered voters, with 67.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 4.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 23.5 percentage points.
